label: Adviser introduced self, Trust Point, and purpose of call
description: Opening: Did the adviser introduce themselves by name, state they are calling from Trust Point Mortgage and Protection Services, and explain the purpose of the call?

label: Explained the call is to review the customer's protection needs
description: Opening: Did the adviser explain they are calling to understand the customer's situation and see what protection cover may be suitable?

label: Stated Trust Point is authorised and regulated by the FCA
description: Regulatory (word-for-word): Did the adviser state that Trust Point Mortgage and Protection Services is authorised and regulated by the FCA?

label: Confirmed fully-advised, whole-of-market, no fee
description: Regulatory (word-for-word): Did the adviser confirm they work on a fully advised basis with all major insurers/lenders and do not charge a fee for the service?

label: Gave the call-recording disclosure
description: Regulatory (word-for-word): Did the adviser confirm that all calls are recorded for training and monitoring purposes?

label: Set expectations for the fact-find
description: Opening: Did the adviser explain they will ask about circumstances, financial commitments, income, family situation and existing cover before advising?

label: Informed customer of the services the company provides
description: Mandatory services: Did the adviser inform the customer of the services the company provides while finalising details?

label: Told customer key facts & services sent by email
description: Mandatory services: Did the adviser say that if a policy is arranged, the full key facts document and services provided will be sent by email?

label: Mentioned policy can be placed in Trust free of charge
description: Next steps: Did the adviser mention the policy can be put into Trust free of charge where applicable?

label: Explained data sharing with insurer & verification provider and sought agreement
description: Data sharing: Did the adviser explain information is shared with the insurer and external verification provider only, never passed elsewhere, and ask if that is alright?

label: Obtained a clear 'yes' to information sharing (hard consent)
description: Consent (hard yes required): Did the adviser obtain an explicit 'yes' from the customer to the information-sharing statement before proceeding?

label: Covered cancellation rights and privacy policy
description: Cancellation: Did the adviser say the policy can be cancelled at any time and reference the privacy policy on the website?

label: Delivered the vulnerability / duty-of-care statement
description: Vulnerability (Consumer Duty): Did the adviser deliver the duty-of-care statement, mention vulnerability, and offer the 'Support When You Need It Most' brochure?

label: Summarised the client's main risks and confirmed agreement
description: Needs summary: Did the adviser summarise the client's main areas of concern/risk and confirm the client agrees before moving to the recommendation?

label: Gave the recommendation and checked 'have I got that right?'
description: Recommendation (word-for-word): Did the adviser state the areas of concern / recommendation and check 'have I got that right?'

label: Obtained a clear 'yes' to the recommendation (hard consent)
description: Consent (hard yes required): Did the adviser obtain an explicit 'yes' confirming the recommendation before continuing?

label: Explained policy features & benefits
description: Features & benefits: Did the adviser explain the product(s), insurer, cover amount, term, premium and why it fits the client's circumstances?

label: Gave the honesty/accuracy & non-disclosure warning
description: Regulatory (word-for-word): Did the adviser warn that questions must be answered honestly and accurately and that inaccuracies could invalidate the policy or affect a claim?

label: Explained possible GP contact / 1-in-10 checks
description: Underwriting: Did the adviser explain providers may contact the GP for a medical report or run 1-in-10 application checks?

label: Sought consent for insurer to contact the GP
description: Consent: Did the adviser ask whether the customer is happy for the provider to contact their GP if needed?

label: Asked if client wants to see the GP report first
description: Consent: Did the adviser ask whether the client wants to see a copy of any GP report before it is sent to the provider?

label: Allowed the customer to answer every H&L question themselves
description: Health & Lifestyle: Did the adviser allow the customer to answer every Health & Lifestyle question themselves?

label: Did NOT lead the customer in their H&L answers
description: Health & Lifestyle (integrity): Did the adviser avoid leading the customer in their Health & Lifestyle answers? Fail if the adviser steered or suggested answers.

label: Gave the wrap-up recap intro
description: Wrap-up: Did the adviser introduce the wrap-up (recap recommendation, confirm outcome, confirm what is being put in place, explain next steps)?

label: Recapped the recommendation after the H&L application
description: Recommendation recap: Did the adviser recap the recommendation (product, insurer, suitability) after completing the Health & Lifestyle questions?

label: Confirmed the recap still matches what the client wanted (hard consent)
description: Consent (hard yes required): Did the adviser confirm the recap is still clear and matches what the client wanted to achieve?

label: Explained add-ons & key policy features
description: Add-ons & key features: Did the adviser explain any add-ons (e.g. waiver of premium) and key points such as exclusions, moratorium, waiting/deferred period or special limitations?

label: Checked 'is that all clear?' on add-ons / key features
description: Add-ons & key features: Did the adviser check the customer understood the add-ons and key features ('is that all clear?')?

label: Confirmed happy with cover, premium and everything applied for (hard consent)
description: Consent (hard yes required): Did the adviser confirm the client is happy with the cover, the premium and everything applied for?

label: Took the customer's preferred payment date
description: Payment date: Did the adviser take the customer's preferred regular payment date (1st-28th of the month)?

label: Confirmed documents by email and got a firm yes
description: Documents: Did the adviser confirm policy documents will be sent by email and obtain a firm yes? Proceed only on a clear yes.

label: Explained exclusions and 30-day cancellation rights
description: Exclusions & cancellation (word-for-word): Did the adviser explain that the policy may not pay out in some circumstances (e.g. suicide in first 12 months / inaccurate info) and that there are normally 30 days to cancel without penalty?

label: Reassured on future support
description: Future support: Did the adviser reassure the client about ongoing support (personal broker, welcome pack by email, future cover review)?

label: Asked for a Google review
description: Google review: Did the adviser ask the customer for a Google review (only where the customer was happy)?

label: Made the friends & family referral ask
description: Referral: Did the adviser ask whether anyone else might benefit from a protection review and mention the £30 referral voucher?

label: Raised will / estate planning where appropriate
description: Estate planning: Where the client has no will, did the adviser raise estate planning and offer a follow-up with an estate planning colleague?

label: Confirmed the client is happy with the service (hard consent)
description: Final close (hard yes required): Did the adviser confirm the client is happy with the service / policy arranged today?

label: Closed properly and invited final questions
description: Final close: Did the adviser explain they are about to start/submit the policy/application and invite any final questions before doing so?

label: Clearly stated the application has been referred
description: Application outcome (Referred): Did the adviser clearly state the application has been referred for further underwriting and not yet declined?

label: Explained the policy is not active yet and possible outcomes
description: Application outcome (Referred): Did the adviser explain the policy is NOT active yet, there is no final decision/premium/start/payment date, and the insurer may accept, amend, request more info or decline?

label: Took bank details making clear policy not active / no payment taken
description: Direct Debit (Referred): Did the adviser take the sort code/account number for if the policy proceeds, while making clear the policy is not active yet and no payment will be taken unless accepted and started?
